ratings.comment: This was the second class taught by Prof. Yavuz that I've taken. Once again above average teaching and I highly recommend.
He cares a lot about physics and gives solid lectures. He tries to make sure the students actually understand the material which is nice. Highly recommend.
He's a doll. His voice is really soothing to listen to. Good at explaining things
Amazing. There are no other words.

Definitely a breath of fresh air after learning from Prof. Winokur for the first quarter. Yavuz goes at a nice pace and likes to make sure the class understands. Unfortunately, it caused us to miss a section or two at the end. His exams are still kinda tricky, but it doesn't demoralize you.
